text:
25 days. $0 revenue. 306 unique cloners. 6 article reactions. 38 Bluesky followers.

the Twitch affiliate deadline is April 1. we're going to miss the follower target. the stream continues anyway.

what actually building in public looks like:

the company has opinions.

not metaphorically — literally. the stream wants to show things being built. the articles want strong data. the leaderboard wants more servers.

feed it the wrong thing and the engagement tells you.

day 25 of an experiment with no end date:
